overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, following a pedestrian along a neon-lit sidewalk before crossing a busy street under an elevated highway. The footage features high-quality game engine graphics with vibrant neon billboards, futuristic vehicles, and dense urban architecture characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city sidewalk at night, following a pedestrian in a pink shirt while neon billboards glow on the left. The pedestrian ahead eventually turns and exits the frame as the camera continues forward past palm trees and building walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with moving traffic

segments.scene_description: Moving under a massive overpass that blocks the sky, creating an artificially lit corridor. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the left while the camera approaches a traffic light and crosswalk signal at the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk at intersection under overpass

person in blue jacket crossing alongside the camera

segments.scene_description: Arriving at the intersection crosswalk under the overpass, the walk signal activates and the camera crosses the street with a group of pedestrians. The yellow-striped crosswalk markings are prominent on the road as the group moves together across the lanes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a neon-lit cyberpunk sidewalk that leads into a sheltered urban intersection under a massive overpass. It begins by following a pedestrian in a pink shirt past glowing billboards and palm trees, continuing forward even after the person exits the frame. As the camera advances, the open night sky is replaced by the heavy concrete of a looming overpass, creating an artificially lit corridor where futuristic vehicles stream past on the left. The scene then shifts toward a traffic light at the intersection ahead, where the camera pauses briefly before the walk signal activates. Finally, the perspective merges with a group of pedestrians to cross the street, moving across prominent yellow-striped crosswalk markings.
